\DoxyCodeLine{02539\ \ \ \ \ \textcolor{keywordflow}{for}\ (\textcolor{keyword}{auto}\ pos\ =\ s.find(f);\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \textcolor{comment}{//\ find\ first\ occurrence\ of\ f}}
\DoxyCodeLine{02540\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ pos\ !=\ std::string::npos;\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \textcolor{comment}{//\ make\ sure\ f\ was\ found}}
\DoxyCodeLine{02541\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ s.replace(pos,\ f.size(),\ t),\ \ \ \ \ \ \textcolor{comment}{//\ replace\ with\ t,\ and}}
